name: jsgroup
message: JS Group International is a house of brands that encourages individual expression, authenticity, innovation and social responsibility. ‍ JS Group entered the North American fashion scene more than 50 years ago, having first made its mark in the evening wear market in 1971. Today, we have expanded into eight divisions, and are widely recognized as one of the leading suppliers of women's sportswear, dresses and evening wear, available in specialty stores, major chain stores and department stores worldwide, as well as on our brand websites.  Each of our brands, AMUR, Theia, JS Collections, Et Ochs, has a unique attitude that not only reflects the trends, but aims to instill confidence in all women, regardless of age or size. In addition, we hold licenses for BCBGMAXAZRIA, Halston and Kay Unger.
